narrative.context: You post an achievement. Someone comments: 'Wow, must be nice.' You feel stung and unsure if it’s sarcasm or genuine.
narrative.prompt: What understanding best fits before replying?

options.label: Recognize ambiguity; consider multiple emotions
options.description: Hold that it could be envy, teasing, or neutral tone. Decide to clarify privately if needed.

ei.rationale: Understands that similar words can reflect different emotions and motives; keeps interpretation flexible.

options.label: Assume mild negativity and respond politely
options.description: Reply briefly without escalating and move on.

ei.rationale: Maintains control, but still settles on one emotional meaning without confirming.

options.label: Assume they’re attacking you
options.description: Conclude they are jealous and respond defensively.

ei.rationale: Locks into a single hostile interpretation; reduces accurate emotion understanding.

options.label: Publicly shame them
options.description: Reply with sarcasm to embarrass them.

ei.rationale: Escalates social threat and conflict; ignores emotional complexity and context.
